The '''Alashan city control center''' was the central structure within the [[Unidentified Alashan city|underground city]] of [[Alashan]]. The structure was the source of power for the entire city, and any damage to its internal workings adversely affected the technological systems of the city. As well as providing general power, the control center was the source of power behind the [[Sentinel (creature)|Guardian of Forever]] which protected the entire city.

Around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] heroes, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] infiltrated the control center and critically damaged it, shutting down power to the enormous city and killing the Guardian of Forever. However, after the Rebels had left the planet behind, the power in the gigantic complex started back up, implying that the complex had found some way to repair itself.

==Appearances==
